description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle (Vehicle 1) operating in manual mode was in stop-and-go traffic in the left through lane on northbound Potrero Avenue at 
24th Street in San Francisco. The Zoox vehicle was gradually slowing to a stop for stopped traffic ahead when a passenger car (Vehicle 2), 
traveling directly behind the Zoox vehicle, moved left to proceed towards the left turn lane. As the passenger car passed the Zoox vehicle, 
the passenger-side mirror of the passenger car swiped the radar unit on the driver-side quarter panel of the Zoox vehicle. There was minor 
damage to the Zoox vehicle. The driver of the passenger car did not stop and left the scene without exchanging information. There were no 
reported injuries and police were not called. 
Print
Clear Form
